t: A rectangle is split into 4 equal parts. 1 part is shaded. What fraction is shaded?
e: 1 out of 4 equal parts is shaded. That is the fraction 1/4, or one fourth.

t: A circle is cut into 2 equal parts. What is each part called?
e: When a shape is cut into 2 equal parts, each part is called a half.

t: A pie is cut into 8 equal slices. 5 slices are eaten. What fraction was eaten?
e: 5 out of 8 equal slices were eaten. The fraction is 5/8.

t: How many halves make 1 whole?
e: 2 halves put together make 1 whole. Think of 2 half-circles making a full circle.

t: How many fourths make 1 whole?
e: 4 fourths make 1 whole. 4/4 = 1 whole.

t: How many eighths make 1 whole?
e: 8 eighths make 1 whole. 8/8 = 1 whole.

t: A square is split into 2 equal parts. Both parts are shaded. What fraction is shaded?
e: Both parts are shaded, so 2 out of 2 parts are shaded. That is 2/2, or 1 whole.

t: A candy bar is split into 8 equal pieces. You eat 1 piece. What fraction did you eat?
e: You ate 1 out of 8 equal pieces. That is 1/8 of the candy bar.

t: A rectangle is cut into 4 equal parts. 3 parts are colored green. What fraction is green?
e: 3 out of 4 equal parts are green. The fraction is 3/4.

t: A pizza is cut into 2 equal slices. 1 slice has pepperoni. What fraction has pepperoni?
e: 1 out of 2 equal slices has pepperoni. That is 1/2.

t: A circle is split into 8 equal parts. 0 parts are shaded. What fraction is shaded?
e: No parts are shaded, so 0 out of 8 are shaded. That is 0/8, which means none.

t: A waffle is cut into 4 equal pieces. You eat 2. What fraction is left?
e: You ate 2 out of 4 pieces, so 4 - 2 = 2 pieces are left. That is 2/4.

t: Which fraction means the whole shape is shaded?
e: 4/4 means all 4 parts out of 4 are shaded. That is the whole shape!

t: An apple is cut into 4 equal slices. Your friend takes 1 slice. What fraction does your friend have?
e: Your friend took 1 out of 4 equal slices. That is 1/4 of the apple.

t: A ribbon is cut into 8 equal pieces. 7 pieces are red. What fraction is red?
e: 7 out of 8 equal pieces are red. The fraction is 7/8.

t: A paper is folded into 2 equal parts. You color 1 part. What fraction is colored?
e: 1 out of 2 equal parts is colored. That is 1/2.

t: A square is cut into 4 equal parts. 4 parts are colored. What fraction is NOT colored?
e: All 4 parts are colored, so 0 parts are not colored. That is 0/4.

t: A cracker is broken into 2 equal halves. What fraction is each half?
e: Each half is 1 out of 2 equal parts. That is 1/2.

t: A circle is divided into 8 equal parts. 4 parts are shaded yellow. What fraction is yellow?
e: 4 out of 8 equal parts are yellow. The fraction is 4/8.

t: A rectangle is split into 4 equal parts. 2 parts are blue. What fraction is NOT blue?
e: 2 parts are blue, so 4 - 2 = 2 parts are not blue. That is 2/4.
